brief: Recommend an architecture for adding document-grounded AI answers to an existing enterprise knowledge product.

facts: Documents are in tenant-isolated object storage and metadata in Postgres.
Search uses keyword search with per-tenant ACL filters.
Customers want answers with citations to exact passages.
Team has six backend and two frontend engineers next quarter.
Vector pilot improved recall but had cross-tenant retrieval bugs because metadata filters were applied after retrieval.
Legal requires deletion propagation within 30 days.
Sales wants a demo in six weeks.
No evaluation set exists for answer quality or citation faithfulness.
constraints: Separate demo path from production hardening.
conflicting_signals: Fast demo helps sales but unsafe retrieval creates trust/privacy failures.
Vector retrieval improves recall but changes security boundary if filters are wrong.

grounding_rule: Use only this context pack. Do not invent facts. Label uncertainty when context is incomplete.
